code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let maybe_prefix = io.read_line()
  let prefix = match maybe_prefix
  when Some(p)
    p
  when None
    Ok(())
    return Ok(())
  end

  mut line_opt = io.read_line()
  while true
    match line_opt
    when None
      return Ok(())
    when Some(line)
      if string.starts_with(line, prefix)
        println("YES")
      else
        println("NO")
      end
      line_opt = io.read_line()
    end
  end
  Ok(())
end
